headline: Jack Henry Expands Digital Asset Role As Valuation Sits Near Fair Value
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (NasdaqGS:JKHY) has partnered with Stablecore and Celsior Technologies to expand its fintech ecosystem. The company is adding access to digital asset services for bank and credit union clients, including stablecoin accounts and tokenized deposits. The new integrations also support direct digital asset connectivity and digital asset backed lending for Jack Henry customers. Jack Henry & Associates is best known for core processing and digital banking technology that...

headline: Conduent Appoints Greta Van to Board of Directors
summary: FLORHAM PARK, N.J., March 06, 2026--Conduent Incorporated (Nasdaq: CNDT), a global technology-driven business solutions and services company, today announced the appointment of Greta Van to its Board of Directors. Van brings more than two decades of progressive leadership experience spanning finance, audit, enterprise risk management, and strategic operations within global, publicly traded organizations.

headline: ICBA Adds Jack Henry's Financial Crimes Defender to Preferred Service Provider Program
summary: Jack Henry® (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that Jack Henry Financial Crimes Defender™ has been added to the Independent Community Bankers of America® (ICBA) Preferred Service Provider (PSP) program.
